name: Bioline Catnip Biscuit - Salmon 80g
description: Description Bioline Catnip Biscuits are made with natural catnip leaves. A treat with excellent palatability and rich in nutrients, which made it suitable for cats and kittens as daily supplement or reward snack! INGREDIENTS: Wheat Flour, Palm Oil, Catnip Leaves, Malt Sugar, Salmon, Shrimp, Sodium, Bicarbonate. Feeding recommendations for Adult Cat: 8-10 pcs/day. Not recommended for kittens under 2 months old.
